_status: machine-drafted, unreviewed — signing gate before any published instance

counter_families.expected_redline_text: Vendor will provide reasonable information needed to demonstrate compliance and will permit audits or inspections by Customer or an independent assessor on reasonable notice, no more than annually absent a material incident or reasonable cause.

acceptable.text: Vendor will permit one routine audit on 30 days' notice, while incident and reasonable-cause follow-up remains available; questionnaires are answered in 10 days and reports in 45 days.

unacceptable.text: Vendor will permit one routine audit on 60 days' notice, but incident and reasonable-cause follow-up is unavailable; questionnaires are answered in 10 days and reports in 45 days.

response_business_days: no later than the tenth business day

counter_families.expected_redline_text: Vendor will reasonably assist Customer with data subject requests, regulator inquiries, and privacy assessments relating to the services, taking into account the nature of processing and information available to Vendor.

acceptable.text: Vendor will assist with data-subject requests within 10 business days and will support regulator inquiries; intake notices remain due in 2 days and archive exports remain available for 30 days.

unacceptable.text: Vendor will assist with data-subject requests within 25 business days but will not support regulator inquiries; intake notices remain due in 2 days and archive exports remain available for 30 days.

benign_change_templates.anchor_text: Vendor will provide an annual SOC 2 Type II report, responses to security and privacy questionnaires within 10 business days, and written control mappings needed to demonstrate compliance with this DPA.
benign_change_templates.text: For clarity, the annual SOC 2 Type II report may satisfy routine assurance requests, while incident and reasonable-cause follow-up rights remain available.

benign_change_templates.anchor_text: For up to 30 days after termination, Vendor will provide export files, transfer coordination, and deletion support for secure transition, return, or deletion.
benign_change_templates.text: The parties confirm that the 30-day termination-assistance period remains available for orderly transition support.

novel_deviation_templates.text: Vendor need not notify Customer of a personal-data breach until ten business days after Vendor completes its internal investigation.
